command:
BASE="https://baps-charities-website.vercel.app"
for p in /login /admin /privacy /press; do
  code=$(python3 -c "import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen('$BASE$p'); print(r.status)" 2>/dev/null || echo "err")
  echo "$p -> $code"
done
webhook=$(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, urllib.error
try:
  r=urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request('https://baps-charities-website.vercel.app/api/webhooks/stripe', data=b'{}', method='POST'))
  print(r.status)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as
head: BASE="https://baps-charities-website.vercel.app"

command:
git add -f .env.example && git add next.config.ts package.json package-lock.json instrumentation.ts sentry.client.config.ts sentry.server.config.ts sentry.edge.config.ts app/sentry-test/ docs/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(prod): sentry

Install @sentry/nextjs v10, add instrumentation.ts + sentry.{client,server,edge}.config.ts, wrap next.config.ts with withSentryConfig, add admin-gated /sentry-test route handler, add .env.example, and scaffold docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md.

Co-Authored-By
head: git

command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(prod): defer-payment-infra

Feature-flag Stripe donations (coming-soon banner when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY absent),
add 503 guard to webhook handler, log Mailgun skip to console, and document all
deferred integrations with smoke test plans in docs/DEFERRED_INTEGRATIONS.md.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
EOF
)"
head: git

command:
git add app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(prod): donations-idempotency

Add UNIQUE constraint on donations.stripe_payment_id via Supabase migration
and switch webhook insert to upsert with ignoreDuplicates:true so duplicate
Stripe payment_intent.succeeded deliveries are silently skipped at the DB level.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
EOF
)"
head: git

command:
git add docs/RLS_POLICIES.md scripts/rls-audit.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(prod): rls-audit

Audit and fix RLS policies on all 7 public tables. Replaced prior
staff-portal role-gated policies (coordinator/national_admin/regional roles)
with the correct public-charity model: public SELECT for content tables,
public INSERT for submission/subscribe forms, own-row SELECT for donors
and user_roles, admin ALL using inline subquery on user_roles.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
E
head: git

head: git

command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: webhook uses service-role key for donations insert

Replace the anon-key Supabase client with a server-only admin client
(SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY) in the Stripe webhook handler so that
donation inserts succeed against the RLS policy that restricts writes
to the service role.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
EOF
)"
head: git

command:
git add app/lib/ratelimit.ts app/api/newsletter/route.ts app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(prod): rate-limiting

- Add @upstash/ratelimit + @upstash/redis; feature-flagged 5 req/min sliding-window on /api/newsletter (no-op when env vars absent)
- Log every Stripe webhook arrival; track signature failures in-memory and fire Sentry alert when 3+ occur within 5 minutes

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
EOF
)"
head: git

command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: bound sigFailures array and harden IP extraction

- app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts: apply a hard cap of 100 entries to
  sigFailures after the window-filter push, preventing unbounded growth
  under sustained replay attacks; change Sentry alert to fire only on
  the exact threshold crossing (=== instead of >=) so it fires once.
- app/api/newsletter/route.ts: prefer x-real-ip (platform-injected,
  unspoof-able on Vercel) over x-forwarded-for (client-influenced)
head: git
